title: rubus × oreophilus
intro: Rubus × oreophilus, also known as the hybrid raspberry, is a cross between the European raspberry (Rubus idaeus) and the fragaria (Fragaria vesca) or the wild strawberry. It is a shrub-like perennial plant with edible fruits and has been traditionally used in herbal medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Rubus × oreophilus include reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and supporting digestive function, as well as providing antioxidant protection against cell damage. The plant can be prepared into various herbal preparations such as teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be used to support overall health and well-being.
